ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Prolusio academica de motu trepidationis terrae mutato in illa centro grauitatis
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: auspicijs eminentiss. & reuerendiss. principis Marcelli Sanctacrucii S. R. E. Card. et Episc. Tiburtini Habita a Io. Ssephano Linievvski Polono in Academia Parthenia Collegij Romani Societatis Iesu
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur, si videbitur Reverendiss. P. Mag. Sac. Pal. Apost. A Episc. Verul. Vicesregens. -- Imprimatur. Fr, Vincentius Fanus magist. & Socius Reverendiss. Pat. Fr. Vincentij Candidi Magist. Sac. Pal. Apost. Ord. Praedicatorum
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
